name: The Back Nine Golf | West Bloomfield, MI
address: 4301 Orchard Lake Rd suite 145, West Bloomfield Township, MI 48323
about: The Back Nine Golf is a golf simulator venue located in West Bloomfield, MI. The venue offers a modern golf simulation experience for players of all skill levels. While specific details about the technology and amenities are not readily available on the website, the facility is designed to provide a comfortable and convenient environment for golfers to practice and play.
why_golfers_like_it: Accessible location in West Bloomfield, MI
Suitable for both casual play and serious practice

faq.answer: The venue's policy on outside food and drinks is not specified. It's recommended to inquire directly with the facility.

faq.answer: The time required to play 18 holes may vary depending on the simulator software and number of players. Please contact the venue for specific timing information.
